description: Major homepage and navigation overhaul: update navbar links, fix country dropdown, fix type badge visibility, fix career path grid spacing, add contact form for register/enroll buttons, remove for-employers footer link, add new filter options, and add more opportunity listings.
steps: 1. Update app/components/Navbar.tsx: Change navLinks array to [{href:'/', label:'Home'}, {href:'/opportunities', label:'Opportunities'}, {href:'/post', label:'Post'}, {href:'/mail', label:'Mail'}]. Remove all references to for-employees and for-students.
2. Update app/components/Footer.tsx: Remove the 'For employers' link (<Link href='/for-employees'>For employers</Link>).
3. In app/page.tsx, replace the country dropdown options with a comprehensive list of ALL world countries (at minimum 195+ countries listed alphabetically). Remove the 'Other' option.

4. In app/page.tsx opportunity cards, fix the type badge (Remote/In person/Hybrid) colors: Change the typeColors record so all badges use black text (text-black dark:text-black) with slightly lighter/more subtle highlight backgrounds (e.g., bg-violet-100, bg-blue-100, bg-teal-100 for light mode; lighter dark mode variants).

5. In app/page.tsx 'How it works' section (career path): Change the grid from 'grid gap-px overflow-hidden rounded-[var(--radius)] border border-border bg-border md:grid-cols-2' to use explicit 5px gap between all cards. The 5th card ('Learn as you go') should be centered. Use a layout like flex-wrap or grid with justify-center for the last item.

6. In app/page.tsx webinar section: Replace the Register button (currently just <button> with no action) with a button that opens a modal/form showing contact info fields: Gmail/email, phone number, and any additional info. Same for the Enroll button in certifications section. Create a ContactFormModal component that both buttons trigger.

7. In app/page.tsx sidebar filters section: Add three new filter groups after the existing 'Learning' section: (a) Salary Range - a min/max input or preset ranges, (b) Working Hours - checkboxes for Full-time, Part-time, Flexible, (c) Rating - star rating or numeric range filter. Wire them into the filtering logic.

8. In app/page.tsx: Add more opportunities to the opportunities array (at least 6 more, for a total of 12+). Include diverse roles, companies, locations, pay ranges. The homepage should show only the first 6 and display a 'View all opportunities' link to /opportunities.
acceptance_criteria: Navbar shows exactly: Home, Opportunities, Post, Mail
Country dropdown lists all world countries (195+), no 'Other' option
Type badges (Remote, In person, Hybrid) next to job titles have BLACK text with light highlight backgrounds
How it works cards have 5px spacing/gap, 'Learn as you go' card is visually centered
Register buttons on webinars open a contact form with email/gmail, phone, info fields
Enroll buttons on certifications open a contact form with email/gmail, phone, info fields
Filter sidebar includes Salary Range, Working Hours, and Rating filters
Opportunities array has 12+ items, homepage shows first 6 with link to /opportunities
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm all pages generate without errors
Run `npm run lint` and confirm no lint errors
